# On the Shortness of Life

*[Seneca](../philosophers/seneca.md) · 49*

A famous essay in which Seneca argues that life is not short, but that we squander it on vain pursuits and endless projects. He urges us to inhabit the present fully and to devote our time to wisdom rather than to trivial affairs.
